llm_advice.rationale: Baseline is correct but bottlenecked by multiple ATen GEMM and add launches. Fusing B.T @ X and A @ result into a single kernel that writes directly to the output tensor eliminates intermediate allocations and reduces launch overhead, targeting the rank-16 path while preserving cuBLAS for the large W @ X GEMM.
risk_controls: validate correctness against baseline for all d in [3584, 4096, 4608]
static review for memory safety and launch bounds
benchmark with at least 10 iterations and 3 warmup runs
stop_conditions: no speedup improvement after two fused kernel variants

notes: Use ATen/cuBLAS for the d x d GEMM.
Explore kernels that fuse Y += A @ T for rank 16.
